chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Wealth Tax Appeal No. 147 of 2000 along with WTA Nos. 148, 388, 389, 817, 818 & 189 of 2000 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of case. ----------------- 23.02.2023. None present for the Appellant. Ms. Lubna Pervez, Advocate for Respondent. __________ None present on behalf of the Appellant nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing and these matters were adjourned with a note of caution that if the Appellant’s Counsel does not proceed, appropriate orders may be passed; but today, again nobody has turned up. Such conduct on the part of the Appellants reflects that they are not interested in proceeding with these matters; whereas, these are old matters pertaining to year 2000, and are to be decided on priority basis as per directions issued by the National Judicial Policy Making Committee and reiterated by the Circular of Honourable Chief Justice. In view of such position, this Court is left with no choice but to dismiss these Appeals for non-prosecution. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Appeals as above. Judge Judge Ayaz
